patch.value: pnpm outdated flags commander 15.0.0 available (current 14.0.3). Major bump — needs a breaking-changes review before adopting, since commander underpins all CLI arg parsing, the bootstrap rewrite, and the flag-contract drift tests. Out of scope for the remediation PR #111 (mixing a risky major dep bump into a feature PR is poor practice).
Review commander 15 changelog for breaking changes; bump in an isolated PR; full suite + flag-contract drift tests green; manual smoke of create/list/update/search bootstrap parsing.
